title: Carbon Data Visualization
summary: IBM Carbon's data visualization guidelines covering chart selection, visual encodings, legends, color, interaction, and accessibility as part of a maintained design system. carbon-design-system/carbon repository active as of 2026-07-15.
lessons: Use question-to-chart decision guidance for selecting appropriate visualization types.
Require semantic series tokens, non-color encodings, and table fallbacks for chart accessibility.
Define empty, loading, error, and annotation states as first-class data visualization concerns.
caveats: Carbon chart APIs are IBM-specific implementations; transfer the decision framework and accessibility contracts, not the library.
licenseNote: Carbon is Apache-2.0; documentation is public. Verify current chart package license separately.
antiImitationNote: Transfer chart selection logic, encoding rules, and accessibility contracts; do not adopt IBM's chart component API as the AwesomeDS implementation.
